home.aboutText: A child-centered platform dedicated to supporting holistic development through learning and safe entertainment. We provide educational games, cartoons, songs, and stories in Kinyarwanda that promote strong values, healthy growth, and cultural identity. A trusted space for children and parents, building a future generation that is knowledgeable, confident, healthy, and values-driven.
home.adventureTitle: Your Child's Educational Adventure Starts Here
home.adventureSubtitle: Educational games, engaging videos, and cultural content designed for kids in Rwanda.
home.feature1Desc: Math, languages, and critical thinking games that make learning fun.
home.feature2Desc: Engaging content covering science, culture, and entertainment.
home.feature3Desc: Learning materials and merchandise to enhance the experience.
home.trendingSubtitle: Check out what other kids are enjoying right now
home.ctaSubtitle: Unlimited access to games, videos, and more. Sign up now!

games.pageSubtitle: Pick from our collection of fun, educational games designed to make learning exciting!
games.colorShapeDesc: Match colors and shapes to train visual recognition
games.countingDesc: Count animals and learn numbers from 1 to 20
games.memoryDesc: Flip cards to find matching pairs and train your memory
games.wordBuilderDesc: Build words by arranging letters in the correct order
games.puzzleDesc: Slide tiles to reconstruct the image
games.howMany: How many animals do you see?
games.spellTheWord: Spell the word for this image

religion.pageSubtitle: Learn timeless values and moral lessons
